description: Clinic staff searches for owners by last name and opens matching owner records
main_flow: Open find owners page | enter last name | submit search | inspect matching owners

description: Clinic staff registers a new pet owner with contact information
main_flow: Open new owner form | enter owner details | submit | view created owner record

description: Clinic staff edits an existing owner's address or contact information
main_flow: Open owner details | choose edit owner | update fields | save changes

description: Clinic staff adds a pet profile under an owner record
main_flow: Open owner details | choose add pet | enter pet name birth date and type | save pet

description: Clinic staff records a veterinary visit for a pet
main_flow: Open owner and pet details | choose add visit | enter visit date and description | save visit

description: Clinic staff views veterinarians and specialties
main_flow: Open veterinarians page | browse vet list and specialties

description: Visitor creates a new account for the publishing platform
main_flow: Submit username email and password | validate uniqueness | create user | receive token

description: User logs in and retrieves an authenticated current-user representation
main_flow: Submit credentials | validate password | generate JWT | return current user with token

description: Authenticated author publishes an article with title body description and tags
main_flow: Submit article payload | validate slug uniqueness | persist article | return article data

description: Reader lists articles using author tag favorite or pagination filters
main_flow: Request article list | apply query filters | return paginated articles

description: Authenticated reader adds and manages comments on an article
main_flow: Open article | submit comment | store comment against article and author | list comments

description: Reader follows another author profile and marks articles as favorites
main_flow: Open profile or article | follow author or favorite article | persist relationship | return updated profile or article

description: Billing user creates edits views and searches client records
main_flow: Open clients module | create or edit client details | save | view client profile

description: Billing user creates an invoice for a client and adds invoice items
main_flow: Open invoice creation modal | select client | create invoice | add line items | save totals

description: Billing user turns an accepted quote into an invoice
main_flow: Open quote | choose quote-to-invoice action | create linked invoice | review generated invoice

description: Billing user records a payment against an invoice
main_flow: Open payments form or invoice payment modal | enter amount method and date | save payment | update invoice balance

description: Billing user maintains reusable products and project tasks for billing
main_flow: Open product or task module | create or edit catalog entry | use item in billing workflow

description: Administrator configures invoice quote payment tax and email settings
main_flow: Open settings | update invoice quote payment or tax settings | save configuration

description: User starts or creates a timesheet entry against project and activity
main_flow: Open timesheet | create or start entry | choose project activity and time | save entry

description: User creates multiple time entries through the quick-entry workflow
main_flow: Open quick entry | enter several project activity time rows | submit batch

description: Manager maintains customers projects and activities used for time tracking
main_flow: Open customer project or activity module | create or edit entity | assign visibility and teams
code_paths: src/Controller/CustomerController.php | src/Controller/ProjectController.php | src/Controller/ActivityController.php | src/Repository/CustomerRepository.php | src/Repository/ProjectRepository.php | src/Repository/ActivityRepository.php

description: Manager exports filtered timesheet records for reporting or billing
main_flow: Open export | filter by date user project or customer | choose export renderer | download output

description: Manager creates invoices from tracked billable time
main_flow: Open invoice module | filter billable records | choose template/calculator | generate invoice

description: Administrator creates users assigns roles and adjusts permissions
main_flow: Open user or permission module | create or edit account | assign roles or permissions | save

description: User creates edits and reconciles asset liability expense or revenue accounts
main_flow: Open accounts | create or edit account | reconcile balances when needed

description: User records withdrawal deposit or transfer transactions
main_flow: Open transaction form | enter source destination amount category and date | store transaction

description: User creates budgets and budget limits to plan spending
main_flow: Open budgets | create or edit budget | set budget limit | view budget report

description: User creates recurring bills and views bill due information
main_flow: Open bills | create or edit bill | inspect bill report or chart

description: User creates rule groups and rules to modify matching transactions automatically
main_flow: Open rule groups or rules | define triggers and actions | test or execute rules

description: User generates reports for accounts budgets bills categories tags or balances
main_flow: Open reports | choose date range and dimensions | view charts or report pages

description: Listener searches songs artists albums and genres in the music library
main_flow: Open library or search | query songs artists albums or genres | browse returned media

description: Listener plays a song or streams audio through the web or Subsonic interface
main_flow: Choose song | request play or stream endpoint | receive audio stream | update playback status

description: Listener creates playlists and adds moves or removes songs
main_flow: Open playlist area | create playlist | add or reorder songs | update playlist metadata

description: Listener marks songs or other media as favorites and views favorite songs
main_flow: Toggle like on song | store favorite | fetch favorite songs list

description: Administrator uploads song files and resolves duplicate uploads
main_flow: Open upload workflow | submit song file | detect duplicates | keep or discard duplicate upload

description: Listener downloads selected songs albums artists playlists or favorites
main_flow: Select downloadable media | check downloadable count | request download archive
